method_en: A three-layer price stack read for a foundry CEO: (L1) upstream supplier input cost → (L2) foundry wafer/packaging ASP → (L3) downstream customer end-product ASP. Real transaction prices are mostly confidential, so each tracked price is either a LIVE market proxy (stock/PPI/commodity via yfinance + keyless FRED — clearly labelled) or a CURATED price estimate with a tier (T1 filings · T2 analyst/channel · T3 news/rumor) and an is-estimate flag. The engine computes each layer's momentum, the cost→ASP→end-market pass-through, a 0–100 pricing-power score and a CEO verdict; Claude (Opus 4.8, rules fallback) writes the read, scenarios and divergence alerts. Seed values render the board offline.
method_zh: 給代工 CEO 的三層價格堆疊判讀:(L1)上游供應商投入成本 →(L2)代工 wafer／封裝 ASP →(L3)下游客戶終端 ASP。真實成交價多屬機密,故每筆價格非即時市場代理(股票/PPI/原物料,經 yfinance + 免 key FRED,明確標示),即為策展估計值並附證據等級(T1 財報官方 · T2 分析師/通路 · T3 新聞/傳聞)與「估計值」旗標。引擎計算各層動能、成本→ASP→終端的轉嫁率、0–100 議價能力分數與 CEO 結論;Claude(Opus 4.8,無 key 走規則)撰寫判讀、情境與背離警報。種子值讓看板可離線渲染。

layers.role_en: What it costs TSMC to make a wafer — silicon, substrates, chemicals, tools. Rising = cost pressure.
layers.role_zh: 台積電製造一片晶圓的投入 — 矽晶圓、載板、特化、設備。上升 = 成本壓力。

items.note_en: Lithography tool pricing power feeds straight into per-wafer depreciation cost. Equity proxy — sentiment-damped in the cost momentum.
items.note_zh: 微影設備的定價權直接灌入每片晶圓的折舊成本。股價代理 — 在成本動能中已做情緒衰減。

items.name_zh: 應材 AMAT(設備成本代理)
items.note_en: Deposition/etch tool demand & pricing — a read on equipment cost inflation. Equity proxy — sentiment-damped in the cost momentum.
items.note_zh: 沉積/蝕刻設備需求與報價 — 設備成本通膨的判讀。股價代理 — 在成本動能中已做情緒衰減。

items.note_en: Raw-material proxy for substrates, lead-frames and interconnect.
items.note_zh: 載板、導線架與互連的原物料代理。

items.name_zh: 美國 PPI — 半導體製造
items.note_en: Official producer-price index for semiconductor device manufacturing.
items.note_zh: 半導體元件製造的官方生產者物價指數。

items.source_zh: SUMCO / 信越揭露 + TrendForce(估計)
items.note_en: Blank-wafer contract pricing; indexed (100 = baseline). News flags a 2026 turning point in wafer price increases — seed nudged to +1.8%/m. ⚑ needs human calibration. Confidential — estimate.
items.note_zh: 空白晶圓合約價;指數化(100=基準)。新聞指 2026 為晶圓漲價轉折 — 種子上調至 +1.8%/月。⚑ 需人工校準。屬機密 — 估計值。

items.source_zh: 欣興 / Ibiden / AT&S 通路(估計)
items.note_en: Advanced-substrate price for high-layer-count AI packages.
items.note_zh: 高層數 AI 封裝用的高階載板價格。

items.name_zh: EUV 光阻 / 特化氣體
items.source_zh: JSR / TOK / 信越 新聞(估計)
items.note_en: Consumable chemicals for leading-edge litho; thin supplier base.
items.note_zh: 先進微影耗材化學品;供應商基礎薄弱。

layers.name_zh: 代工 wafer / 封裝 ASP
layers.role_en: What TSMC (and rivals) charge per wafer & for advanced packaging. Rising = revenue / pricing power.
layers.role_zh: 台積電(與對手)每片 wafer 與先進封裝的報價。上升 = 營收 / 定價權。

items.name_zh: 台積電(自家 ASP/營收代理)
items.note_en: Market's read on TSMC blended ASP, mix and pricing power. Equity proxy — sentiment-damped in the ASP momentum.
items.note_zh: 市場對台積電綜合 ASP、產品組合與定價權的判讀。股價代理 — 在 ASP 動能中已做情緒衰減。

items.source_zh: 分析師/通路估計 + 2026 漲價報導(T2)
items.note_en: Reports point to up to +15% N3 hike across 2H26 (≈+2–4%/m phased); seed nudged to +4.5%/m to track the news. ⚑ needs human calibration vs actual contract resets. Exact price confidential.
items.note_zh: 報導指向 2H26 N3 累計漲幅 up to +15%(分階段約 +2–4%/月);種子上調至 +4.5%/月以追蹤新聞。⚑ 需人工依實際合約重訂校準。實際報價屬機密。

items.note_en: Mature leading-edge node; pricing firmer as N3 ramps.
items.note_zh: 成熟的先進節點;隨 N3 放量,價格趨穩偏強。

items.source_zh: 通路/分析師 — 產能緊缺重訂價(T2)
items.note_en: Tightest bottleneck in the AI chain → strongest foundry pricing power. News: CoWoS ASP nearing 7nm, key profit driver. ⚑ needs human calibration.
items.note_zh: AI 供應鏈最緊的瓶頸 → 代工定價權最強之處。新聞:CoWoS ASP 逼近 7nm、關鍵獲利引擎。⚑ 需人工校準。

items.note_en: Mature-node price stability vs China overcapacity is the soft spot.
items.note_zh: 成熟製程價格相對中國產能過剩的穩定度,是軟肋。

items.note_en: Reference only (excluded from momentum) — discounting caps TSMC's hikes.
items.note_zh: 僅供參考(不計入動能)— 折讓會壓抑台積電漲幅。

items.name_zh: Intel 18A 外部報價(競爭者參考)
items.note_en: Reference only — nascent external pricing, thin order book.
items.note_zh: 僅供參考 — 外部報價初期、訂單薄弱。

layers.role_en: What TSMC's customers charge for the finished chips/products. Rising = end-market strength & room to raise.
layers.role_zh: 台積電客戶的成品晶片/產品售價。上升 = 終端強勁、有漲價空間。

items.name_zh: NVIDIA(資料中心 GPU 需求/ASP 代理)
items.note_en: TSMC's #1 leading-edge customer; their ASP power = TSMC's room to raise. Equity proxy — sentiment-damped in the demand momentum.
items.note_zh: 台積電最大先進製程客戶;其 ASP 議價力 = 台積電的漲價空間。股價代理 — 在需求動能中已做情緒衰減。

items.note_en: Second AI-accelerator buyer; widens TSMC's customer pricing base. Equity proxy — sentiment-damped in the demand momentum.
items.note_zh: 第二大 AI 加速器買方;擴大台積電客戶議價基礎。股價代理 — 在需求動能中已做情緒衰減。

items.note_en: Memory is a co-input to the AI module; HBM inflation eats customer budgets.
items.note_zh: 記憶體是 AI 模組的共同投入;HBM 漲價侵蝕客戶預算。

items.note_en: Broad memory pricing — a demand thermometer for servers & devices.
items.note_zh: 整體記憶體報價 — 伺服器與裝置的需求溫度計。

items.note_en: Storage demand pulse for AI servers and edge devices.
items.note_zh: AI 伺服器與邊緣裝置的儲存需求脈動。

items.note_en: Finished-accelerator street price — the very end of the value chain.
items.note_zh: 成品加速器通路價 — 價值鏈最末端。

alerts.en: No sharp divergence across the stack this read — cost, foundry ASP and demand are moving roughly together.
alerts.zh: 本次判讀價格堆疊無明顯背離 — 成本、代工 ASP 與需求大致同步。

pricing_power_read.en: Verdict: DEFENSIBLE at 64.5. Foundry ASP momentum (2.65) runs well ahead of upstream cost (1.06), giving us a positive foundry−cost margin delta of +1.59. Translation: we can hold — and selectively raise — leading-edge and CoWoS pricing right now, because our ASP is expanding faster than input cost. The caveat is the downstream side: customer end-ASP momentum (1.67) is below ours, so aggressive across-the-board hikes risk friction. Raise where scarce (N3, CoWoS); hold on mature nodes.
pricing_power_read.zh: 評分64.5，判定：可守。晶圓ASP動能(2.65)明顯領先上游成本(1.06)，晶圓−成本利差達+1.59。意即：現階段可守並選擇性調漲先進製程與CoWoS報價，因ASP擴張快於投入成本。隱憂在下游：客戶終端ASP動能(1.67)低於我方，全面漲價恐生摩擦。策略——稀缺處(N3、CoWoS)漲，成熟製程守。

transmission_read.en: Upstream→foundry pass-through 250% (>100%): we are more than fully passing input cost through — margin is expanding, not just holding. Foundry→downstream 63% (<100%): we are moving ahead of the end market; customers are not re-pricing as fast as we are. This is the classic 'we lead' posture — good for near-term margin but it means the next hike must be justified by scarcity (CoWoS/HBM allocation), not by cost, or customers push back.
transmission_read.zh: 上游→晶圓傳導250%(>100%)：成本不僅全額轉嫁，利差正在擴張。晶圓→下游63%(<100%)：我方領先終端市場，客戶重定價速度慢於我方。此為典型「我方主導」姿態——短期利多，但下一輪漲價須以稀缺性(CoWoS/HBM配額)而非成本為由，否則客戶將抗拒。

upstream.en: Cost momentum is mild (+1.06); silicon wafer +1.8% and ABF +0.5% are calm, copper actually −7.66% — input pressure is contained, no cost shock threatening our margin.
upstream.zh: 成本動能溫和(+1.06)；矽晶圓+1.8%、ABF+0.5%平穩，銅甚至−7.66%——投入壓力受控，無成本衝擊威脅利差。

foundry.en: Foundry is the strongest layer (+2.65), led by CoWoS +5.0% and N3 +4.5% — advanced packaging and leading-edge scarcity are doing the pricing work, exactly where we want power concentrated.
foundry.zh: 晶圓為最強一層(+2.65)，由CoWoS+5.0%、N3+4.5%領軍——先進封裝與先進製程稀缺性主導定價，正是我方希望集中話語權之處。

downstream.en: Demand ASP up +1.67 but uneven: HBM3E +6% and AMD firm, yet NVDA equity sentiment −11.83% (damped −2.96) flags demand-narrative wobble — solid, not euphoric.
downstream.zh: 下游ASP+1.67但分化：HBM3E+6%、AMD穩健，惟NVDA股價情緒−11.83%(阻尼−2.96)顯示需求敘事略有動搖——穩健但非狂熱。

leading_signals.en: CoWoS advanced-packaging lead-times and allocation — the earliest tell on how much scarcity premium we can still extract.
leading_signals.zh: CoWoS先進封裝交期與配額——最早反映我方尚能榨取多少稀缺溢價。

leading_signals.en: HBM3E/HBM4 contract reset cadence (currently +6%) — HBM tightness leads AI wafer demand by a quarter.
leading_signals.zh: HBM3E/HBM4合約重定價節奏(現+6%)——HBM緊俏領先AI晶圓需求約一季。

leading_signals.en: NVIDIA / AMD capex and GPU channel pricing (B200/GB200 +2.5%) — downstream willingness-to-pay before our ASP books.
leading_signals.zh: NVIDIA/AMD資本支出與GPU通路價(B200/GB200+2.5%)——反映下游付費意願，早於我方ASP入帳。

leading_signals.en: Silicon-wafer & ABF substrate contract resets (⚑calibrate flags) — earliest move on future cost-side squeeze.
leading_signals.zh: 矽晶圓與ABF基板合約重定價(⚑校準旗標)——未來成本擠壓的最早訊號。

leading_signals.en: Samsung/Intel/China mature-node quoting — first sign of 28nm price-war risk to our commodity book.
leading_signals.zh: 三星/英特爾/中國成熟製程報價——28nm價格戰對我方成熟業務的首發訊號。

scenarios.trigger_en: N3/CoWoS ASP hikes stay ≥ +4%/m while HBM3E ≥ +5% and AMD/NVDA demand proxies hold flat-to-up.
scenarios.trigger_zh: N3/CoWoS ASP續漲≥+4%/月，HBM3E≥+5%，且AMD/NVDA需求代理持平至上行。

scenarios.trigger_en: Downstream ASP momentum falls below +1.0 and foundry→downstream pass-through stays <60% for two reads as customers resist hikes.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 下游ASP動能跌破+1.0，晶圓→下游傳導連兩期<60%，客戶抗拒漲價。

scenarios.trigger_en: Silicon wafer + equipment + HBM input costs each +>2%/m while foundry ASP momentum falls under +1.5, cutting margin delta toward zero.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 矽晶圓+設備+HBM投入成本各+>2%/月，晶圓ASP動能跌破+1.5，利差趨近零。

scenarios.trigger_en: 28nm/mature ASP turns negative m/m as Samsung/Intel/China discounting widens, dragging blended ASP momentum below +2.
scenarios.trigger_zh: 三星/英特爾/中國折讓擴大，28nm/成熟ASP轉負，拖累混合ASP動能低於+2。

falsification.en: Foundry−cost margin delta turns negative (upstream→foundry pass-through drops <100%) — verdict flips from DEFENSIBLE to SQUEEZED.
falsification.zh: 晶圓−成本利差轉負(上游→晶圓傳導<100%)——判定由可守翻為受擠壓。

falsification.en: Downstream ASP momentum falls below upstream cost momentum AND NVDA/AMD demand proxies both turn negative — demand-led squeeze, verdict to NEUTRAL/SQUEEZED.
falsification.zh: 下游ASP動能低於上游成本動能，且NVDA/AMD需求代理雙雙轉負——需求主導擠壓，判定轉中性/受擠壓。

falsification.en: CoWoS/N3 hikes stall (≤+1%/m) for two consecutive reads — scarcity premium exhausted, DEFENSIBLE no longer supported.
falsification.zh: CoWoS/N3漲幅連兩期停滯(≤+1%/月)——稀缺溢價耗盡，可守判定失據。

watch.en: NVIDIA/AMD GPU channel & street pricing (B200/GB200) — earliest demand-side tell.
watch.zh: NVIDIA/AMD GPU通路與街頭價(B200/GB200)——最早的需求端訊號。

watch.en: CoWoS lead-times and packaging allocation queue.
HBM3E/HBM4 contract price resets and DRAM/NAND spot.
Silicon-wafer & ABF substrate contract prices (⚑calibrate flags).
watch.zh: 矽晶圓與ABF基板合約價(⚑校準旗標)。

watch.en: Samsung/Intel/China mature-node quotes for 28nm price-war signal.
watch.zh: 三星/英特爾/中國成熟製程28nm報價之價格戰訊號。

watch.en: Upstream→foundry and foundry→downstream pass-through ratios each read.
watch.zh: 每期上游→晶圓及晶圓→下游傳導比率。

watch.en: ASML/AMAT equipment cost proxies and semiconductor PPI.
watch.zh: ASML/AMAT設備成本代理及半導體PPI。

blind_spots_en: Real per-customer wafer prices are confidential — leading-edge ASP rows are tier-T2/T3 ESTIMATES, not TSMC's price book.

Equity proxies (TSM/NVDA/ASML/AMAT/AMD) track sentiment & mix, not the literal transaction price — their 1m move is sentiment-damped (×0.25, capped ±4%) before it can touch the bargaining score, and their raw move is rolled into a separate market-sentiment reference that does NOT enter the score; treat as directional only.
Memory rows blend contract & spot; TrendForce indices lag real deals by days–weeks.
FX (NTD/USD) and product-mix shift move reported ASP independently of list price — not isolated here.
Competitor rows (Samsung/Intel) are reference-only and excluded from the momentum aggregate.
blind_spots_zh: 真實逐客戶晶圓報價屬機密 — 先進製程 ASP 列為 T2/T3 估計值,非台積電價目表。
股價代理(TSM/NVDA/ASML/AMAT/AMD)反映情緒與組合,非字面成交價 — 其月變動先做情緒衰減(×0.25,上限 ±4%)才能影響議價分數,原始變動另彙總成不進分數的市場情緒參考;僅供方向參考。
記憶體列混合合約與現貨;TrendForce 指數落後實際成交數日至數週。
匯率(新台幣/美元)與產品組合變動會獨立於牌價牽動報導 ASP — 此處未隔離。
競爭者列(三星/Intel)僅供參考,未計入動能彙總。

Taiwan Semiconductor plans 15% price hike for 3nm chips in H2 2026

Advanced Nodes Shipments to Capture 60% Share in 2026 as 3nm Leads, 2nm Adoption Rises

news.title: Tight DRAM Supply to Boost DDR5 Contract Prices—Profitability in 2026 Expected to Surpass HBM3e, Says TrendForce
